GFO Legal Framework Pull Request Checklist

Summary

Describe the change:

Files Changed

List files changed:

Change Class

Select one:

* Class A — Board-record change
* Class B — Counsel-review change
* Class C — Editorial change only

Legal-Risk Review

Confirm:

* This change does not imply GFO custodies public assets.
* This change does not imply GFO manages public assets.
* This change does not imply token holders may expect profit from GFO efforts.
* This change does not imply redemption, yield, dividends, buybacks, revenue sharing, or guaranteed liquidity.
* This change does not imply GFO is a bank, broker, exchange, custodian, investment adviser, money transmitter, trust company, or public family office.
* This change does not claim completed legal compliance without written counsel approval.
* This change preserves the anchor phrase: “GFO coordinates the experiment. GFO does not custody the public.”

Review Required

* Board review required
* Counsel review required
* No board/counsel review required because this is editorial only

Evidence Preservation

* CHANGELOG.md updated.
* Version number or review note updated where needed.
* Screenshots or public-disclosure records preserved if public copy changed.
* Commit history does not rewrite prior legal-policy history.

Final Confirmation

I confirm this pull request preserves the non-custodial, no-investment-promise, no-redemption-guarantee, and no-public-asset-management posture of the GFO Token Legal Framework.
